About Kim Antique

Beauty That
Transcends Time

Kim Antique brings together the finest Asian art and antiques under one curated space. With over 30 years of dedicated study and collecting, every piece carries the weight of centuries and the beauty of distant cultures.

Our mission is to share these treasures so they may enrich your living space and inspire your soul — for those who truly appreciate them.

Kim-Hu Sinlapawanich — Collector & Curator

Singing Bowl · Meditation

Watch on YouTube — Kim-Hu Singing Bowl Practice

7 Chakras — Kim-Hu's System

Sound That Heals

In an age of relentless information, the Tibetan Singing Bowl offers a path back to stillness. Resonant vibrations clear the mind, restore balance, and invite you to live with calm presence.

Note Mapping — Kim-Hu's System

No. Chakra Note Essence
1 Root · Muladhara F Stability
2 Sacral · Svadhisthana C Emotion
3 Solar Plexus · Manipura G Power
4 Heart · Anahata D Love
5 Throat · Vishuddha A Expression
6 Third Eye · Ajna E Intuition
7 Crown · Sahasrara B Transcendence
Explore Workshop →

Workshop Series — Sound of Self

Sound
of Self

An intimate 120-minute experience weaving Tibetan Singing Bowls with the exploration of the 7 chakras — from a holy basil tea ceremony to a guided Sound Bath, led personally by Kim-Hu within Kim Antique.

  • — Holy Basil Tea Ceremony · Ground the body before the sound begins
  • — 7 Chakra Journey · Map your body through sound and sensation
  • — Hands-On Bowl Exploration · Find the bowl that resonates with your soul
  • — Sound Bath · Guided group meditation led by Kim-Hu

Book a Session

Sessions are held by appointment for small groups and private bookings. Contact Kim-Hu directly to arrange a date and learn more about the experience.

  • Duration 120 minutes
  • Group Size 6–12 participants
  • Includes Tea · 7 Bowls · Sound Bath · Practice Card
  • Venue Kim Antique · Room 339
